name: agent_compare
description: Compare 2-5 ACP agents side-by-side. Input: agentIds — comma-separated numeric IDs (recommended) or exact names (e.g. '12446, 13053' or 'AnonSentinel, Alpha.Intelligence'). Use numeric IDs from agdp.io for best accuracy. Output: comparison table per agent: name, isOnline, successRate, completedJobs, uniqueBuyers, offeringCount, priceRange, token + winner_summary. Use cases: pick the best agent, benchmark competitors, A2A hiring. Triggers: compare agents, which agent is better, benchmark, agent vs agent.

agentIds.description: Comma-separated agent IDs (e.g. '12446, 13053') or names (e.g. 'AnonSentinel, Alpha.Intelligence'). 2-5 agents. Numeric IDs recommended.
